upgrade.mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
upgrade.mobile.subtitle: Add global data to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country and currency.
upgrade.mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi.
upgrade.mobile.unlimited.features.thrott: High-speed data subject to fair-use and network management policies
upgrade.mobile.unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
upgrade.mobile.unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.
upgrade.mobile.disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
upgrade.mobile.disclaimer.fairUse: High-speed data may be subject to fair-use limits, local network conditions, and regional availability.

upgrade.mobile.packs.10gb.title: {{scope}} 10 GB

upgrade.mobile.compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone).
upgrade.mobile.small.title: Small pack
upgrade.mobile.small.bestFor: Best for short trips and light messaging.
upgrade.mobile.medium.title: Medium pack
upgrade.mobile.medium.bestFor: Best for everyday messaging, maps, and light media.
upgrade.mobile.large.title: Large pack
upgrade.mobile.large.bestFor: Best for longer trips and heavier app use.
upgrade.mobile.xl.title: XL pack
upgrade.mobile.xl.bestFor: Best for extended travel and frequent video or media use.
upgrade.family.small.title: Family Small
upgrade.family.medium.title: Family Medium
upgrade.family.medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members.
upgrade.family.feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits
upgrade.why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
upgrade.why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.
upgrade.why.card.textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
upgrade.why.card.textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.
upgrade.why.card.voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
upgrade.why.card.voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.
upgrade.why.card.messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
upgrade.why.card.messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.
upgrade.why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.
upgrade.faq.cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
upgrade.faq.cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.
upgrade.esim.local.unlimited.title: Local Unlimited
upgrade.esim.local.unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across your selected country, subject to fair-use and local network availability.
upgrade.esim.europe.10.desc: 10 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.
upgrade.esim.europe.unlimited.title: Europe Unlimited
upgrade.esim.europe.unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported European countries, subject to fair-use and local network availability.
upgrade.esim.global.20.title: Global 20 GB
upgrade.esim.global.unlimited.title: Global Unlimited
upgrade.esim.global.unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported global destinations, subject to fair-use and local network availability.

randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
gettingStarted.section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.
gettingStarted.section3.title: 3) Go further
safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.
safety.tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction
safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.
blog.whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely on messaging apps for daily communication with friends, family, and colleagues. Whether it's a quick update or a long conversation, messaging provides a convenient and flexible way to stay in touch.
blog.whyMessaging.speedDesc: One of the main advantages of messaging platforms is their speed. Messages are delivered instantly, allowing users to communicate in real time. This level of convenience has made messaging the preferred method of communication for many people.
blog.global.title: The Future of Global Communication
blog.global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over the past few decades. What once required phone calls or in-person meetings can now be done quickly through messaging platforms. As technology continues to advance, global communication is becoming faster, more accessible, and more inclusive.
blog.index.title: Chatforia Blog
blog.index.intro: Explore insights on communication, online safety, and how messaging technology is connecting people around the world.
blog.chatSafely.scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
blog.chatSafely.scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.
blog.chatSafely.responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
blog.chatSafely.responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.
blog.chatSafely.whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
blog.chatSafely.whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.
blog.chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language chat effortless. Messages are end-to-end encrypted by default, and built-in translation supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can enable disappearing messages, keep read receipts optional, and sync across devices. Available on iOS, Android, and the web.
advertise.title: Advertise with Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging users with tasteful, brand-safe placements. We offer banner inventory in high-visibility spots, sponsorships, and house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads.
advertise.adsense.withPubIdShort: We also serve inventory via Google AdSense. You can target Chatforia with publisher ID {{pubId}}, or use the form below for direct sponsorships.
advertise.adsense.noPubIdShort: We also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are available—use the form below.
advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about your campaign and we’ll recommend placements.
advertise.why.highSession: High session frequency and dwell time in chat UI
advertise.why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Start a Chat” modal) available
advertise.why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads
advertise.form.submittedMsg: Thanks! Your inquiry is on its way. We’ll follow up shortly.
advertise.form.missingRequired: Please fill in name, email, and message.
advertise.form.successToast: Thanks! We’ll be in touch soon.
advertise.form.mailtoInfo: Opening your email client to send the inquiry…
advertise.legal.disclaimerStart: By submitting, you agree to our
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply by email.
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
privacyPolicy.infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.
privacyPolicy.sharing.title: Sharing
privacyPolicy.sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.
privacyPolicy.rights.title: Your rights
privacyPolicy.rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.
privacyPolicy.changes.title: Changes
privacyPolicy.changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.
privacyPolicy.contact.title: Contact
privacyPolicy.contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
terms.yourContent.title: Your content
terms.yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).
terms.changes.title: Changes
terms.changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.
terms.contact.title: Contact
terms.contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive to provide a high-quality service to all users. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.
refund.subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
refund.subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time through your account settings or the platform used to purchase.
refund.eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
refund.eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.
refund.nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
refund.nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.
